steps: Open Mission Control and confirm OPERATING DATA is visible.
Inspect the acquisitions and property-research functional roles.
expected: The Phase 1 organization surface uses the approved functional labels, including Acquisitions Agent and Property Research Agent, and contains no mascot labels.
actual: Acquisitions Agent is visible and mascot labels are absent, but the canonical org roster still renders the older functional label Due Diligence Specialist instead of Property Research Agent.
apiOrDbEvidence: The live /api/landos/org payload is driven by src/landos/agent-roster.ts, where dd_bot retained the older display name.
